tables: Bihar BPSC Integrated 72nd Combined (Preliminary) Competitive Exam 2026 Recruitment 2026 Pre Exam Date for 1189 Post

Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) has released the notification for the recruitment of Integrated 72nd Combined (Preliminary) Competitive Exam 2026. Those Candidates Are Interested to the Following BPSC 72 Pre Exam 2026 Vacancy Can Apply Online from 07/05/2026 to 31/05/2026. See the advertisement for information related to age limit, syllabus, Department wise post, selection procedure, pay scale in BPSC Integrated 72nd Combined (Preliminary) Competitive Recruitment 2026.

Important Dates Application Begin : 07/05/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 31/05/2026 Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 31/05/2026 BPSC 72th Pre Exam Date : 26/07/2026 Admit Card Available : Before Exam
Application Fee General / BC/ Other State : 100/- SC / ST / PH : 100/- Female Candidate (Bihar Dom.) : 100/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Online / Offline Fee Mode Only

BPSC 72 Exam Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 01/08/2025 Minimum Age : 21-22 Years (Post Wise) Maximum Age : 37 Male Maximum Age : 40 Female Age Relaxation Extra as per BPSC 72  Pre Examination Rules.

If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
